title: Graduate Engineering Trainee
description:
Job Title: GET – Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineer (R&D)

Company: Frido

Location: Pune, India

Role Type: (On site)

Department: Research & Development




Role Overview

We are looking for a Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering to join

our R&D team. The role involves working on end-to-end product development including design,

prototyping, validation, and integration of mechanical, electronic, and control systems.

This is a hands-on role suited for candidates who are curious, adaptable, and eager to work in a fast

paced, innovation-driven startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in product design and development from concept to prototype.

• Create and modify 3D CAD models, assemblies, and technical drawings.

• Perform basic CAE/FEA analysis for design validation and optimization.

• Work on mechanical-electronic integration for functional prototypes.

• Develop and test basic embedded/control logic for prototypes.

• Support testing, validation, and iteration of designs.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (electronics, software, manufacturing).

• Participate in research, benchmarking, and design improvement activities.




Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering (Freshers / Recent Graduates)




Technical Skills

Design & CAD

• Understanding of mechanical design principles

• Proficiency in at least one CAD tool:

o SolidWorks / Creo / NX / CATIA or equivalent




CAE / Simulation

• Basic understanding of FEA concepts

• Exposure to tools such as:

o ANSYS Workbench / SolidWorks Simulation or equivalent




Electronics, Controls & Embedded Systems

• Fundamental understanding of electronics and control systems

• Hands-on experience with microcontrollers / embedded platforms:

o Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32, Jetson Nano or equivalent




Soft Skills & Attributes

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a dynamic environment

• Willingness to take ownership and responsibility

• Comfortable working in a startup / fast-paced R&D setting

• Good communication and teamwork skills




Good to Have (Preferred)

• Experience with prototyping tools (3D printing, basic fabrication)

• Exposure to product development lifecycle

• Basic knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes

• Experience with interfacing sensors, motors, or actuators

• Interest in interdisciplinary systems (mechanical + electronics + software)




What You’ll Gain

• Hands-on exposure to real-world product development

• Opportunity to work on innovative, user-centric products

• Cross-domain learning across mechanical, electronics, and embedded systems

• Fast growth in a high-impact R&D environment




Interested candidates can share their CV on sanobar.s@myfrido.com

Show more

title: Human Resources (HR) Trainee in Navi Mumbai, Bangalore, Ghaziabad, Gurgaon, Faridabad, Delhi, Pune
description:
As a Human Resources Trainee at Spinfluence Technology, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in various HR functions while working in a dynamic and innovative tech company. Your role will involve assisting with recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, and other HR activities.

Key Responsibilities Include


Assisting with recruitment process, including posting job ads, screening resumes, and scheduling interviews.
Conducting new employee orientation and assisting with the onboarding process.
Maintaining employee records and updating HR databases.
Assisting with employee relations issues and conflict resolution.
Assisting with performance management processes, including performance reviews and goal setting.
Providing support for HR projects and initiatives.
Utilizing MS-Office, MS-Word, and MS-Excel for various HR tasks and projects.


If you are a motivated and organized individual with a passion for HR and technology, this is the perfect opportunity for you to kickstart your career in HR. Join us at Spinfluence Technology and be a part of our dynamic team!

About Company: Spinfluence Technology delivers innovative IT consulting services in Sitecore, .NET, Oracle, and SAP to help businesses transform, scale, and thrive in the digital era. We specialize in providing end-to-end IT consulting services tailored to your unique business needs. With expertise in Sitecore for personalized digital experiences, .NET for scalable application development, Oracle for robust database solutions, and SAP for seamless enterprise integration, we empower businesses to achieve their goals efficiently and effectively. Our team of certified professionals is dedicated to delivering innovative, future-ready solutions that drive growth, enhance productivity, and ensure long-term success.

title: Human Resource Trainee
company: Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd
description:
Company Description

Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd is a healthcare HVAC company specializing in the design and installation of Modular Operation Theatres, Modular ICU/PICU/NICU, and IVF labs. Established in 1997, the company has been at the forefront of creating infection-free zones and highly sterile environments for critical healthcare facilities.




Role Description

We are seeking a full-time Human Resource Trainee to join our team at our office located in Chinchwad, Pune District. The role will involve supporting daily HR operations, learning about HR policies, assisting in personnel management, managing employee benefits, and contributing to the development and implementation of HR initiatives. The trainee will gain hands-on experience in all facets of HR management in an on-site setting.




Qualifications

Knowledge of Human Resources (HR) and HR Management practices
Understanding of HR Policies and Employee Benefits administration
Basic skills in Personnel Management
Strong organizational and time management skills
Excellent verbal and written communication abilities
Proficiency with office software (e.g., Word, Excel, and PowerPoint)
Relevant educational background in HR or Business Administration
Eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment




Send your resume with cover letter :

Mail Id - hr@wiespl.com

Contact No. - 9881151272

title: Finance Intern - Collections
description:
About Us

We are the independent expert in assurance and risk management. Driven by our purpose, to safeguard life, property, and the environment, we empower our customers and their stakeholders with facts and reliable insights so that critical decisions can be made with confidence.

As a trusted voice for many of the world’s most successful organizations, we use our knowledge to advance safety and performance, set industry benchmarks, and inspire and invent solutions to tackle global transformations.

About GSS

As the internal support organization for DNV and DNV owned companies, we deliver shared services within Human Resources, Finance, IT and Real Estate & Procurement to DNV globally. Our mission is to enable DNV to grow, succeed with its business goals and improve competitiveness. Customer experience is at the core of everything we do. GSS is responsible for many of the tools, processes and daily routines that create the backbone of DNV.

About The Role

We are seeking Finance Intern- Collections for the Global Centre GSS Finance based in Pune, India.

Duration: 6 months (Hybrid work model- 3 days in office and 2 days work from home).

The Finance Intern- Collections team will report to the Team Leader.

The Finance Intern- Collections is a member of a team of accountants, overseeing all accounts receivable duties of a given geographical region.

To succeed in this role, you are a team player with the ability to create an atmosphere of motivation and enthusiasm to be part of building up the Global Centre.

You will play a key role in service implementation of the Accounts Receivable processes.

Key Tasks


Sending email reminders to customers.
Making calls to customers, Handling disputes.
Payment plan handling, administrative tasks.
Updating customer master data.
Refund preparation and review.
Perform collection calls on assigned customer accounts.
Process customer credit applications.
Create and maintain customer profiles.
Provide timely and accurate correspondence with internal and external customer.
Smooth closure of the month-end related activities.


What we offer


Being part of a truly international company with more than 161 years of heritage in a Transitioning industry.
Learning and Development.
Working with great colleagues who values teamwork and team development.
Building a professional network through expert within DNV.


Qualification

About you


Positive attitude, customer centric mindset and willingness to go the extra mile to meet organizational goals.
Ability to build good relationships with different stakeholders.
Attention to details and deadlines.
Logical and Analytical Thinking.
Ability to multi-task and prioritize.
Proven ability to learn and understand new software/accounting systems.
Ambition to develop into future supervisor roles.
Bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance or Business Administration.
Candidate should be flexible with shifts to support various geographies as per business requirement.
Excellent English skills required, written and verbal.
Should be able to work for 6 months.


Security and compliance with statutory requirements in the countries in which we operate is essential for DNV. Background checks will be conducted on all final candidates as part of the offer process, in accordance with applicable country-specific laws and practices.
Show more

title: Mechatronics / Robotics Intern
description:
Company Description

Decouvertes Future Tech Pvt Ltd is a deep‑tech hardware company committed to building genuinely indigenous, Made‑in‑India technology. We design, engineer, and manufacture advanced mechanical and electromechanical systems entirely in India, with a strong focus on innovation, precision, and real‑world performance.

Founded with the belief that India is fully capable of creating world‑class hardware, we aim to bridge the gap between import‑dependenceand true technological self‑reliance. Our mission is simple:

Engineer in India. Build in India. For India — and for the world.




Our Core Product Verticals :




Indigenous Custom 3D Printers
End‑to‑end engineered 3D printing systems built specifically for Indian industries, research institutions, and manufacturing environments. Designed from scratch for reliability, scalability, and cost‑efficiency.
Precision UAV Accessories
High‑performance mechanical components for unmanned aerial vehicles, designed for demanding Indian conditions and real‑world applications across defence, agriculture, surveillance, and industry.
FPV Drone Systems
Advanced First Person View drones built for speed, accuracy, and mission‑critical operations in areas such as cinematography, inspection, training, and tactical applications.




Role Description

The Mechatronics/Robotics Intern will assist with designing, prototyping, and testing robotic systems and components. Day-to-day responsibilities include collaborating with the R&D team on various projects, performing technical calculations, developing control systems, and troubleshooting mechanical and electronic components. The intern will also participate in data collection, analysis, and report generation to support product development. This is a full-time, on-site role based in Pune District.




Qualifications

Hands-on experience or education in robotics, mechatronics, or control systems
Technical proficiency in programming languages like Python, C++, or MATLAB
Knowledge of sensors, actuators, and microcontrollers (e.g., Arduino, Raspberry Pi)
Familiarity with CAD/CAM tools for mechanical design and drafting
Basic understanding of electronic circuit design
Problem-solving skills with the ability to troubleshoot and debug mechanical and electronic systems
Ability to collaborate effectively in a cross-functional team environment
Bachelor's degree (in progress or completed) in Mechatronics, Robotics, Mechanical Engineering, or related field
Prior internship or project experience in robotics or automation is a plus
Show more

title: TOOLBOX -BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN
description:
Toolbox - BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN

Toolbox Studio is a media organization in India, specialized in Visual Effects & Animation, TV Commercials, Motion Graphics and Corporate Video Production. We are designed to provide solutions to a range of industries that include Film, Broadcast, Online, Digital and spectrum of corporate sectors such as IT, Education, Hospitality, Automobile and Lifestyle. Along with having international experience across 3 continents, Toolbox is firmly rooted with its extensive home experience that places us uniquely to deliver international as well as domestic projects with equal professionalism. www.toolbox-studio.com

Job Title / Designation: BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN

We are looking for a detail-oriented Business Development Intern with a strong focus on CRM management and process support. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with data, maintaining structured workflows, and supporting business growth initiatives through organized systems. This will be a 3-month internship which can be converted to full time employment based on performance.

Key Responsibilities


Maintain and update CRM with accurate client, studio, and project information
Track incoming inquiries and potential opportunities within the VFX pipeline
Research production houses, studios, and OTT platforms for potential collaboration
Organize and segment client data based on geography, project type, and service requirements (Roto, Paint, Comp, etc.)
Monitor communication history, follow-ups, and engagement timelines in the CRM
Assist in preparing pitch decks, company profiles, and bid documentation
Support coordination between business development and production team
Identify gaps in data/processes and suggest improvements for better workflow efficiency

Requirements


Strong attention to detail and data organization skills
Basic understanding of the VFX pipeline (Roto, Paint, Compositing, etc.) is a plus
Familiarity with CRM systems and structured workflows
Good communication and coordination skills
Proficiency in Excel / Google Sheets

Work Experience Required

0-1 Years of Experience (of handling international clients), Freshers can apply.

Education: Recently completed a degree

Location: Baner, Balewadi High Street,Pune

Languages

English, Hindi (bilingual / fluent proficiency), Marathi (Working knowledge proficiency)

Any Other Skill Set


Interest in the VFX, film, or OTT industry
Experience with research on production companies
Basic understanding of bidding and project coordination in VFX

title: Project Management- Trainee
description:
Excited to start your career in a technical PMO environment? If you enjoy working with data, collaborating with teams, and driving project success, we encourage you to apply and grow with us!




Job Title: PMO Executive / Management Trainee (Technical PMO)

Location: Bangalore

Work Mode: Work From Office

Experience Required: freshers ( 0-1 year )

Notice Period: Immediate Joiners




About the Role

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented professional to join our team as a PMO Executive. This role is ideal for candidates with a strong management background and a keen interest in Project Management Office (PMO) functions, data handling, and reporting.




Key Responsibilities

Assist in PMO activities including planning, tracking, and reporting of projects
Handle and manage data, ensuring accuracy and consistency
Create and maintain reports, dashboards, and documentation
Coordinate with internal teams to track project progress
Support project governance and process improvements
Communicate effectively with stakeholders and team members
Contribute to overall project efficiency and timely delivery

Mandatory Requirements

MBA graduate (mandatory)
Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel
Experience in data handling, reporting, or management-related tasks
Strong communication skills (verbal and written)
Interest and enthusiasm for working in a Technical PMO environment

Preferred / Value-Added Skills

Ability to guide and inspire teams
Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills
Experience in client interaction or stakeholder management
Basic understanding of project management concepts and tools

Key Competencies

Attention to detail
Organizational and multitasking abilities
Proactive and self-driven attitude
Team collaboration and coordination skills

Why Join Us?

Opportunity to work in a structured PMO environment
Exposure to real-time project management practices
Career growth in project management and operations
Collaborative and dynamic team culture

title: Graduate Apprentice Trainee
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

Who We Are And What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join Volvo Group. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

About Volvo Group

At Volvo Group, we are driving prosperity through transport and infrastructure solutions, shaping the future of sustainable mobility. As part of our commitment to nurturing young talent, we invite fresh engineering graduates to join us under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS). This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on industry experience and work alongside experts on real-world projects

Eligibility Criteria


Education: B.Tech / B.E. in Materials Technology or Chemical Engineering
Year of Graduation: 2023, 2024, or 2025
Program: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) .


Key Skills & Knowledge Areas


Strong fundamentals in Material Science (metals, polymers, chemicals) and Sustainability
Knowledge of PLM Tools is an advantage
Excellent Proficiency in MS Office tools (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Advanced Excel skills (pivots, macros etc) and PowerBI is desired.
Good analytical and problem-solving skills
Effective communication and teamwork abilities


Roles & Responsibilities


Support Sustainability team in Life Cycle Inventory (LCI) of Target trucks.
Support team in preparing carbon mitigation roadmap and idea generation.
Support team in preparing mitigation strategy for PFAS, Heavy Metals, Substances of Concern (SOC)
Support team in End of Life (ELV) calculations
Learn and apply Volvo’s engineering standards and procedures
Participate in technical reviews, data analysis, and report preparation


Program Duration

As per NATS guidelines

Trucks Technology & Industrial Division hire team players who are ready to create real customer impact. Our decentralized teams work close to our customers, with speed and autonomy, to build what they truly need.

Join us to collaborate on innovative, sustainable technologies that redefine how we design, build, and deliver value. Bring your curiosity, your expertise, and your collaborative energy, and together, we’ll turn bold ideas into tangible solutions for our customers and contribute to a more sustainable tomorrow.
Show more

title: Graduate Engineer Trainee
description:
Position Title: - Graduate Engineer Trainee – Quote and Spec




ZURN Organization:

Headquartered in Milwaukee, Zurn Industries, LLC We manufacture the industry spectrum of advanced water solutions to save customers steps, cost of ownership, and labor. Zurn Industries, LLC supplies the industry’s widest range of advanced water system solutions that enhance and ensure quality, safety, flow control and conservation in and around nonresidential buildings. Zurn builds value and trust through superior knowledge of the global markets and customers we serve. We provide innovative water solutions delivered by exceptional people.




For more information visit, kindly visit: www.zurn.com




Position Summary - The mentioned resource will focus on building quotes, crossing products, and helping sales team w.r.t product engineering knowledge and insights.




Responsibilities

• Ability to read and understand product specification and plumbing plans.

• Ability to read and understand MEP plans and plumbing architectural plans.

• Provides spec writing services including crossing competitive spec and matching them to Zurn products.

• Understanding and able to interpret Plumbing drawings and layouts along with fixture schedule.

• Create digital specifications and collaborate with customers on projects using Zurn’s proprietary digital specification solution.

• Responsibilities also include providing equipment functionality and capability reports to the sales force, and acting as technical liaison to the sales team

• Collaborate closing with the spec sales team to create and delivery specifications for key accounts and large commercial building projects

• Coordinate additional support activities and post-sales technical support with engineering departments.

• Produce Presentations and product comparisons for sales assistance.

• Determine product technical strength/weaknesses vs. competition.

• Specialty knowledge of finished plumbing, fixture carriers, PEX, water safety & control and/or commercial drainage products.




Experience and Skill Required

• BE/B. Tech in Mechanical/Civil Engineering, 2025 pass outs are eligible to apply.

• Knowledge of inside-sales process and quoting/bidding

• Experience with Microsoft Office Suite, (Power Point, Excel, Word, Access)

• Teamwork, presentation, project management, and verbal/written communication skills required

• Ability to work independently and execute task in timely manner.

• Customer Driven Sense of Urgency

• Self-motivated individual able to multi-task effectively and work in a fast-paced environment




Location - Hyderabad, Meenakshi Teck park, Gachibowli.

title: Software Engineer Trainee (Roku)
description:
About The Role

We are looking for a motivated and enthusiastic Software Engineer Trainee (Roku) to join our engineering team. This is an excellent opportunity for freshers or early-career professionals who are passionate about OTT platforms and smart TV application development. You will work closely with experienced developers to build and enhance Roku applications while gaining hands-on exposure to real-world projects.

Key Responsibilities


Assist in developing, testing, and maintaining Roku applications
Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code under guidance
Debug issues and fix bugs in existing applications
Collaborate with senior developers, QA, and product teams
Participate in code reviews and knowledge-sharing sessions
Stay updated with emerging technologies and development practices


Key Skills Required


Basic understanding of programming concepts (knowledge of BrightScript is a plus)
Strong understanding of data structures and algorithms
Familiarity with web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and basic frameworks
Good problem-solving and logical thinking ability
Strong communication and teamwork skills
Willingness to learn and adapt quickly in a fast-paced environment


Good to Have (Roku / OTT Tech)


Basic understanding of the Roku platform and Smart TV ecosystems
Familiarity with BrightScript and SceneGraph framework
Knowledge of OTT/video streaming concepts (HLS, DASH, adaptive bitrate streaming)
Understanding of video players and ad integrations (VAST, SSAI basics)
Exposure to Roku Developer tools and debugging techniques
Familiarity with REST APIs and JSON-based integrations
Awareness of performance optimization for TV devices


Qualifications


Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field
Strong academic background (preferred but not mandatory)
Internship or project experience in software development is a plus
Basic understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)


Why Join Us


Hands-on experience with OTT and Roku development
Opportunity to learn from experienced engineers
Exposure to real-time projects and modern technologies
Collaborative and growth-focused work environment

title: Embedded System Trainee
description:
We are looking for an enthusiastic and motivated Embedded Systems Trainee to join our engineering team. This internship is ideal for final-year graduate students who are passionate about electronics, embedded systems, and hands-on hardware development, and who aspire to build a career in embedded engineering.

As an Embedded Systems Intern, you will work closely with our hardware and firmware teams to understand embedded products and systems. You will assist in firmware development, hardware testing, debugging, sensor interfacing, and system validation, while gaining real-world exposure to embedded technologies and industry practices.

Key Responsibilities:

• Assist in developing and testing embedded firmware for microcontroller-based systems
• Work with microcontrollers such as Arduino, ESP32, STM32, or similar platforms
• Interface sensors, actuators, and communication modules (UART, SPI, I2C)
• Support debugging and troubleshooting of embedded hardware and software
• Perform basic testing and validation of embedded systems
• Document code, test results, and technical observations
• Collaborate with senior engineers on live projects


Requirements

• Basic understanding of Embedded Systems concepts
• Knowledge of C/C++ programming
• Familiarity with microcontrollers and development boards
• Understanding of basic electronics (resistors, capacitors, sensors, power supply)
• Willingness to learn and work on hands-on hardware projects


Benefits

• Internship Certificate upon successful completion of the internship.
• Monthly stipend of ₹15,000.
• Performance Based Placement Offer (PPO) opportunity for high-performing interns.
• Hands-on exposure to real-world Projects
• Mentorship from experienced industry professionals.
• Friendly, growth-oriented work culture in Gurgaon.



Show more

title: Graduate Engineering Trainee
description:
Job Title: GET – Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineer (R&D)

Company: Frido

Location: Pune, India

Role Type: (On site)

Department: Research & Development




Role Overview

We are looking for a Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering to join

our R&D team. The role involves working on end-to-end product development including design,

prototyping, validation, and integration of mechanical, electronic, and control systems.

This is a hands-on role suited for candidates who are curious, adaptable, and eager to work in a fast

paced, innovation-driven startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in product design and development from concept to prototype.

• Create and modify 3D CAD models, assemblies, and technical drawings.

• Perform basic CAE/FEA analysis for design validation and optimization.

• Work on mechanical-electronic integration for functional prototypes.

• Develop and test basic embedded/control logic for prototypes.

• Support testing, validation, and iteration of designs.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (electronics, software, manufacturing).

• Participate in research, benchmarking, and design improvement activities.




Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering (Freshers / Recent Graduates)




Technical Skills

Design & CAD

• Understanding of mechanical design principles

• Proficiency in at least one CAD tool:

o SolidWorks / Creo / NX / CATIA or equivalent




CAE / Simulation

• Basic understanding of FEA concepts

• Exposure to tools such as:

o ANSYS Workbench / SolidWorks Simulation or equivalent




Electronics, Controls & Embedded Systems

• Fundamental understanding of electronics and control systems

• Hands-on experience with microcontrollers / embedded platforms:

o Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32, Jetson Nano or equivalent




Soft Skills & Attributes

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a dynamic environment

• Willingness to take ownership and responsibility

• Comfortable working in a startup / fast-paced R&D setting

• Good communication and teamwork skills




Good to Have (Preferred)

• Experience with prototyping tools (3D printing, basic fabrication)

• Exposure to product development lifecycle

• Basic knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes

• Experience with interfacing sensors, motors, or actuators

• Interest in interdisciplinary systems (mechanical + electronics + software)




What You’ll Gain

• Hands-on exposure to real-world product development

• Opportunity to work on innovative, user-centric products

• Cross-domain learning across mechanical, electronics, and embedded systems

• Fast growth in a high-impact R&D environment




Interested candidates can share their CV on sanobar.s@myfrido.com
